concept: Future / Time Yet to Come / What Will Happen
description: The time after the present; events that have not yet occurred. 'Wireo' names time that approaches—possibility's domain, hope's realm, what we can still shape.
sound_symbolism: The word reaches forward. 'Wi' opens with expectant energy, possibility present. 'Re' extends toward what comes. Finally 'o' opens to the unknown, the future arriving.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'lo wireo' (the future). Opposite of 'luera' (past). Related to the tense particle 'shao' which marks future time.

pillars.solarpunk-values: The future is not fixed—it can be shaped by present choices, built by collective action.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The future exists only in present imagination—anxious grasping causes suffering, wise preparation brings peace.
